creator: gnats-admin@FreeBSD.org
text:
This patch updates Makefile to provide the current location of the source for
port (latest version of Makefile has only .c file) these modifications, and
approval for my maintaining this port was discussed with (and approved by)
Olli Hauer ohauer@, and Philip M. Gollucci.

This patch makes (minor) modifications/additions to:
Makefile
distinfo
pkg-descr
pkg-message


PLEASE NOTE the file attached to this PR is in shar(1) format.

Apologies for having been so careless in my previous attempt to provide this PR.

Fix: See attached patch file


Patch attached with submission follows:
